nodes.name: Google Sheets — Leads
nodes.notes: Configure: Create a Google Sheet called 'LeadHunterIQ Lead Magnet Downloads' with columns: name, email, company, asset, consent, consent_timestamp, utm_source, utm_medium, utm_campaign, downloaded_at

parameters.subject: Your Signal Taxonomy Guide is ready
parameters.html:
Hi {{ $json.name }},

Thanks for downloading The Complete Signal Taxonomy for Indian IT Staffing (2026 Edition).

Download Your Guide

This guide covers 45+ signal types across 7 categories that predict IT staffing demand in India.

We've also subscribed you to The Signal Report — our weekly intelligence newsletter. You'll get the top 10 staffing signals every Monday.

Want to see these signals in action? Book a 15-minute demo.

Best,

nodes.name: Send Download Email
nodes.notes: Configure: Set up SMTP credentials (Resend or Postmark) for sending the download email
